title: Do Your Duty
writer: Julien Josephson, Casey Robinson, Vernon Smith
actors: Charles Murray, Lucien Littlefield, Charles Delaney
plot: While patrolling his New York City beat, Sgt. Tim Maloney is knocked out by the Dalton gang, which was about to pull a robbery when he came along. They pour a bottle of whiskey over his unconscious body, then commit the robbery. W...
